Hi Vanessa, we need to plan the project call. Are you free next week?
Let me check my schedule. On Tuesday I am attending a workshop, but Wednesday is open.
Wednesday works for me too. Shall we arrange it for ten?
Perfect. I am going to prepare the numbers before then. I will send you the agenda today.
Great. And if anything changes, we can postpone it to Thursday.
Sounds good. I will confirm the time by email so we both have it.
You are very organized. This is going to be a smooth project.
Thank you. I am looking forward to it.
I am going to finish the report this week.
I am meeting the team on Wednesday at ten.
I will confirm the time by email.
If anything changes, we can postpone it.
Next year, I am going to travel more.

Let me tell you about my plans for next week. It is going to be a busy one. On Monday, I am meeting my team in the morning to prepare for a big presentation. On Tuesday, I am going to finish the report, because the deadline is Wednesday. I am a little nervous, but I think it will go well. On Thursday, I have a doctor's appointment in the afternoon, so I am going to work from home that day. And on Friday, I am not going to work at all. I am taking the day off. My sister and I are going to drive to the coast for the weekend. I am really looking forward to it. I think it is going to be exactly what I need.

People often ask me about my plans for the future, and I always give the same answer. I am going to keep things simple. Next year, I am going to learn to cook properly. I am not very good now, but I will practice every weekend. In two or three years, I am going to travel more. I have a small list of places I want to see. And one day, when I am older, I am going to live near the sea. That is my real dream. I do not know the exact date yet, but I am sure it will happen. A plan does not need to be perfect. It just needs a first step. So this year, my first step is to save a little money every month.

First, I am going to confirm the meeting. Then, I am going to prepare the report. After that, I will send it to my manager. On Friday, I am attending a workshop. At the end, I am going to take the weekend off.
